name: Progenesis
explicitMods: When Hit during effect, 25% of Life loss from Damage taken occurs over 4 seconds instead
descrText: Right click to drink. Can only hold charges while in belt. Refills as you kill monsters.
flavourText: They were bred in a cosmic ocean of raw creation.
Feasting and drinking of the milk of the mother,
they fought to the death for every last drop.

typeLine: Dabbler's Granite Flask of the Armadillo
descrText: Right click to drink. Can only hold charges while in belt. Refills as you kill monsters.

name: Foulborn Xoph's Blood
explicitMods: Cover Enemies in Ash when they Hit you
mutatedMods: 15% of Physical Damage from Hits taken as Fire Damage
flavourText: We are his blood.
Through us he carries his burning message.

name: Enmity's Embrace
explicitMods: Take 445 Fire Damage when you Use a Skill
Damage Penetrates Fire Resistance equal to your Overcapped Fire Resistance, up to a maximum of 200%
flavourText: In truth, your terror is cold
You mask it with heat and ire
But they know.
They know.

typeLine: Alchemist's Quicksilver Flask of the Cheetah
descrText: Right click to drink. Can only hold charges while in belt. Refills as you kill monsters.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Applies a buff that adds to your armour, and can take some of the damage from hits for you before being depleted.
